evals.prompt: I'm on branch feat-auth. Create a new stacked branch called feat-auth-tests on top of it.
assertions: runs git symbolic-ref --short HEAD to confirm current branch
runs stack-graph.sh set feat-auth-tests feat-auth <sha> null
does not run git push or gh pr create

evals.prompt: Start a new stacked branch called feat-login on top of main.
assertions: runs stack-graph.sh set feat-login main <sha> null
pr_number recorded as null in stack-graph.json
does not open a pull request

evals.prompt: Create a stacked branch called feat-search and open a PR for it.
assertions: uses /stack-create to create the branch and register it in the stack graph
defers PR creation to /stack-submit rather than running gh pr create inline
tells the user to run /stack-submit to open the PR
